name: Wayblock
description: Wayblock is a New Puzzle Game! You can use just the available blocks (Wayblocks) to make a way until the Infinity fire. If you are Ready, click in the player and Go!
requirements:
Minimum:
  • OS *: Windows 7, 10
  • Processor: intel i3
  • Memory: 1 GB RAM
  • Graphics: Intel HD Graphics
  • DirectX: Version 9.0c
  • Storage: 200 MB available space
